subject: Adapt CLI healthcheck test for HTTPS
commit_message:
Adapt CLI healthcheck test for HTTPS

CLI provided a new docker version fixing the security issue
consisting in exposing HTTP public port
The code of the associated healthcheck must be updated

Issue-ID: INT-1501

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I0b66afa3d77be490ddf914d3a0cc3adae0636da0

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
Change has been successfully merged by Morgan Richomme
